# Social Care

Social Care offers personalized in-home support and social activities tailored to bring joy and excitement into your life. From engaging in recreational activities and dining out at local cafes to shopping trips and running errands, the options are limitless and are only driven by your interests and imagination.

Here are some examples of the social and companionship activities we offer:


Enjoy Leisurely Walks

Our carer will accompany you on leisurely walks, providing not just physical support but also engaging in heartfelt conversations to enhance your overall well-being.


Visit the Cinema

Experience the magic of movies together by going to the cinema, creating memories and enjoying the film.


Attend Events and Gatherings

Experience the joy of local events and gatherings, supported by our team to ensure your participation is comfortable and enjoyable.


Creative Poetry Sessions

Our carers foster creativity and emotional expression through collaborative poetry writing and reading sessions, adding a therapeutic touch to our companionship.


Explore the Internet Together

Stay digitally connected with our team as we explore the internet together, using technology to bring joy, information, and shared experiences into your daily life.


Visit Tourist Attractions

Embark on local adventures to tourist attractions, accompanied by our nursing professionals who ensure your explorations are safe, enjoyable, and tailored to your pace.


Engage in Meaningful Conversations

Beyond medical care, our team provides a listening ear and engages in meaningful conversations, offering emotional support and a genuine connection.


Plan and Go On Holidays

Collaborate with carers to plan and enjoy holidays, ensuring your travel experiences are not just memorable but also considerate of your health needs.


Share Life Stories and Memoirs

Create a deeper bond by sharing life stories and memoirs with our team, fostering a sense of companionship and understanding that goes beyond medical care.


Go Shopping for Essentials

Transform routine tasks into social experiences as our team accompanies you on shopping trips, ensuring your essentials are acquired with care and consideration.


Work Together in the Garden

Experience the therapeutic benefits of gardening with our nursing professionals, who provide both physical support and companionship while working together in the garden.

![](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/social-care-1.webp)

[Book an Appointment](https://innerpeace.vision/book-an-appointment/)

### OUR SERVICES

![Personal Care](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Personal-Care.webp)

#### Personal Care

Providing exceptional support in your daily life, ensuring that you can live independently and comfortably in your own home.

[Learn More](https://innerpeace.vision/in-home-nursing-care-services/personal-care/)

![Nursing Care](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/Nursing-Care.webp)

#### Nursing Care

Encompasses a wide range of specialized and personalized support to ensure your holistic well-being.

[Learn More](https://innerpeace.vision/in-home-nursing-care-services/nursing-care/)

![Dementia_Nurse_Consulting](https://innerpeace.vision/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/Dementia_Nurse_Consulting-rnn0ad8eyvrwfnq9thpasqe5t4t6m03r5r6cbnihlq.png)

#### Dementia Care

Compassionate, personalised support for people living with dementia, their families, carers, and care providers across East Gippsland.

[Learn More](https://innerpeace.vision/dementia-care/)
